pokemon:wormadam.name: Wormadam
pokemon:wormadam.summary: When Burmy evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon’s body. The cloak is never shed.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When Burmy evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon’s body. The cloak is never shed.
When evolving, its body takes in surrounding materials. As a result, there are many body variations.
When evolving, its body takes in surrounding materials. As a result, there are many body variations.
When BURMY evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon’s body. The cloak is never shed.
It is said that a WORMADAM that evolves on a cold day will have a thicker cloak.
Its appearance changes depending on where it evolved. The materials on hand become a part of its body.
Its appearance changes depending on where it evolved. The materials on hand become a part of its body.
When evolving, its body takes in surrounding materials. As a result, there are many body variations.
It is said that a WORMADAM that evolves on a cold day will have a thicker cloak.

Its appearance changes depending on where it evolved. The materials on hand become a part of its body.
When Burmy evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon’s body. The cloak is never shed.

pokemon:burmy.name: Burmy
pokemon:burmy.summary: If its cloak is broken in battle, it quickly remakes the cloak with materials nearby.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: If its cloak is broken in battle, it quickly remakes the cloak with materials nearby.
Even if it is born where there are no cocooning materials, it somehow always ends up with a cloak.
Even if it is born where there are no cocooning materials, it somehow always ends up with a cloak.
To shelter itself from cold, wintry winds, it covers itself with a cloak made of twigs and leaves.
It covers itself with a cloak to shelter from the cold. When it’s hot, its cloak is thinner.
If its cloak is even slightly damaged, Burmy will immediately repair it with whatever is close at hand. The Pokémon within the cloak is scrawny and vulnerable to the cold.
To shelter itself from cold, wintry winds, it covers itself with a cloak made of twigs and leaves.
If its cloak is broken in battle, it quickly remakes the cloak with materials nearby.
